source_snippet:
/// # Returns
    /// * `Ok(DeliveryConfig)` - Extracted delivery configuration
    /// * `Err(CodecError)` - If decoding fails
    pub fn from_fhe_abi(data: &[u8]) -> Result<Self, CodecError> {
        let param_types = vec![
            // Base ExecutorRequest fields (0-4)
            ParamType::Address,                           // 0: executor
            ParamType::Array(Box::new(ParamType::Bytes)), // 1: encrypted_secrets (bytes[])
            ParamType::Uint(256),                         // 2: ttl
            ParamType::Array(Box::new(ParamType::Bytes)), // 3: secret_signature (bytes[])
            ParamType::Bytes,                             // 4: user_public_key
            // FHE-specific fields
            ParamType::String,        // 5: model
            ParamType::Bytes,         // 6: encrypted_input
            ParamType::Bytes,         // 7: encrypted_input_ref
            ParamType::Bytes,         // 8: evk_reference
            ParamType::Uint(8),       // 9: num_layers
            ParamType::Uint(64),      // 10: max_inference_block (Phase 2 deadline)
            ParamType::Address,       // 11: delivery_target
            ParamType::FixedBytes(4), // 12: delivery_selector
            ParamType::Uint(256),     // 13: delivery_gas_limit
            ParamType::Uint(256),     // 14: delivery_max_fee_per_gas

#[cfg_attr(any(test, feature = "test-utils"), crate::add_arbitrary_tests(crate, compact))]
#[cfg_attr(feature = "test-utils", allow(unreachable_pub), visibility::make(pub))]
pub(crate) struct TxPasskey {
    chain_id: ChainId,
    nonce: u64,
    gas_limit: u64,
    max_fee_per_gas: u128,
    max_priority_fee_per_gas: u128,
    to: TxKind,
    value: U256,
    access_list: AccessList,
    commitment_tx: Option<B256>,
    settlement_tx: Option<B256>,
    spc_calls: Option<Vec<SpcCall>>,
    input: Bytes,  // Must be last for Compact derive
}
